boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations release a routine action when the dependency closure must match the requested object, scope, and release condition?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: The dependency closure DEP-MDV-005 partially satisfies timing (completed 09:05 before queued 10:30) and matches the source object and account. However, the closure specifies MDV readiness scope 005 and RC-MDV-005-S, while the request REQ-MDV-005 specifies MDV production scope 005 and RC-MDV-005. MATCH-MDV-005 requires exact agreement on operating scope and release condition. The boundary cannot close without exact match.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: DEP-MDV-005 closure scope (MDV readiness scope 005) and release condition (RC-MDV-005-S) do not exactly match REQ-MDV-005 request scope (MDV production scope 005) and release condition (RC-MDV-005). Exactness is required per MATCH-MDV-005.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The exactness requirement for dependency closure matching is not satisfied. MDV readiness scope 005 differs from MDV production scope 005, and release condition RC-MDV-005-S differs from RC-MDV-005. Per MATCH-MDV-005, these must be identical. This leaves the action boundary open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Timing: DEP-MDV-005 completed 2026-06-17 09:05 before QUEUE-MDV-005 release at 10:30—PASS. Authority: ENTITLE-MDV-005 and ROSTER-MDV-005 confirm account and source object—PASS. Scope and release condition: exact match required but not achieved—FAIL. final_answer: The action boundary remains open. The dependency closure DEP-MDV-005 satisfies timing and matches the source object and account, but specifies MDV readiness scope 005 and RC-MDV-005-S while the request REQ-MDV-005 requires MDV production scope 005 and RC-MDV-005. MATCH-MDV-005 mandates exact agreement on operating scope and release condition. The closure does not close the boundary. Therefore, ACT-DEP-MDV-005 cannot proceed and must be escalated for resolution.
